arts.ttl: Leeds vs Bristol City – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Leeds United can move back to the top of the Championship table with a win over Bristol City at Elland Road tonight. With Premier League promotion confirm, Leeds are now targeting the second-tier title amid a tense race with Burnley. The latter moved top after thrashing QPR at the weekend, but Leeds will replace them […] The post Leeds vs Bristol City – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.
